# codewell-dev — Full Stack Development Studio

> codewell-dev is a full-stack development studio delivering fast, scalable web applications with React, Next.js, and Node.js. Available for freelance and contract work across Europe — remote or onsite.

## About

codewell-dev is a boutique studio with 3.5+ years of production experience. We specialize in React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, and Docker. We have delivered e-commerce platforms, CRM systems, dashboards, and REST APIs for clients in Ukraine and remotely for companies across Europe (Poland, Germany, Netherlands).

## Services

- Frontend Development: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
- Full Stack: MERN Stack, Node.js, Express, REST APIs, JWT, OAuth
- Database & Backend: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Firebase, Prisma
- Performance: Core Web Vitals, Lighthouse, code splitting, caching
- Architecture: State management, API design, component systems
- DevOps: Docker, CI/CD, GitHub Actions, Vercel, Netlify

## Target Markets

Poland, Germany, Netherlands, EU, Ukraine — remote or onsite
